positive: A stylized, symmetrical circular emblem featuring a majestic, roaring celestial lion intertwined with geometric forest flora and stylized cosmic constellations. The design should use thick, clean outlines and negative space principles, creating a powerful, mystic silhouette. Color palette is deep navy, burnished gold, and ethereal sapphire blue. Composition is highly centered and balanced, suitable for direct apparel printing. Style: Neo-Art Deco meets Mystical Tattoo Art, high contrast linework, vector illustration quality, clean edges, symmetrical mandala pattern.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, messy, smudges, noise, dirty edges, poor anatomy, poorly drawn, cartoon, photorealism, gradient, muted colors, logos
